response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on senior engineer with genuine breadth (TypeScript/Node, C/C++, D, Java) and real high-scale experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, but the core of this Principal role — experimentation platforms, growth measurement, telemetry, statistical analysis, and rollout/feature-flighting systems — is entirely absent from his background. His testing expertise is software quality testing (TDD, test runners), not product experimentation. He also shows no evidence of IC6-level scope: most roles are senior IC positions at small companies rather than architecting cross-team platforms at enterprise scale.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience spanning web, backend, embedded, and desktop, with proficiency in required languages (C/C++, Java, C#, JavaScript/TypeScript)
Production distributed-systems experience at scale, building low-latency services handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Current hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure) plus a strong craftsmanship culture of TDD, CI/CD, and mentoring via workshops
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, metrics/guardrails, feature-flagging, or statistical analysis experience — the central requirement of the role
No demonstrated Principal-level leadership of multi-workstream, cross-team initiatives at enterprise scale; career is mostly senior IC roles at small companies
No growth engineering or measurement-platform domain exposure, and no evidence of partnering with data science on experimental design

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale systems work
